decisions.briefing: Markets pulled back mildly today with NASDAQ down 0.9% and S&P 500 down 0.6% — a neutral-to-soft session with no major catalyst. Portfolio is holding steady at +30% overall P&L. Cash is only $298.25, which falls below the $500 threshold to open new positions, so despite three open slots and several high-scoring candidates (NVTS, TPL, NBIX all at 95), no new buys are actionable today. Existing positions remain protected by auto stop-loss rules.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted lower on June 3, 2026, with the NASDAQ falling 0.9% and the S&P 500 declining 0.6% in a broad but modest pullback. The move reflected cautious sentiment as investors digested ongoing macro uncertainty, with technology names leading the weakness on the NASDAQ. No single headline dominated, but the mild risk-off tone suggested institutional players were trimming exposure heading into the week.
market_education.summary_zh: 2026年6月3日，美國股市小幅回落，納指下跌0.9%，標普500指數下跌0.6%，整體呈現溫和的風險規避情緒。科技板塊領跌納指，反映出投資者在宏觀不確定性持續的背景下趨於謹慎。市場缺乏單一明確的催化因素，機構資金似乎借機適度減倉，靜待更明朗的方向訊號。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Dry powder refers to the cash reserves an investor keeps available to deploy when good opportunities arise. Today is a perfect example: the screener surfaced multiple high-conviction candidates (NVTS, TPL, NBIX at score 95) but with only $298 in cash, the portfolio can't act on any of them. Maintaining adequate cash buffers ensures you can buy when signals align, rather than watching from the sidelines.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「乾火藥」（Dry Powder）指投資者保留的現金儲備，以便在優質機會出現時能夠迅速部署。今天就是一個典型案例：選股系統篩出多隻高評分標的（如NVTS、TPL、NBIX均達95分），但帳戶現金僅剩約298美元，根本無法建倉。保持充足的現金緩衝，才能確保在信號明確時果斷出擊，而不是乾瞪眼錯失機會。
